app.name: NoteShare
app.tagline: Study files, organized for real student work.

home.title: NoteShare | Study Materials
home.heroSubheadline: Search notes, exams, summaries, worksheets, and class materials from one fast student-friendly library.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search math notes, chemistry exams, English summaries...
home.subjectsSubtitle: Start from the course you are studying today.
home.recentSubtitle: Fresh study materials added by students and tutors.
home.popularSubtitle: Files students keep coming back to.
home.featuresSubtitle: A clean workflow from discovery to review.
home.recentlyViewedSubtitle: Pick up where you left off.
home.noRecentlyViewed: Files you open will appear here.

fastSearch.title: Fast Search
fastSearch.description: Find the right file by subject, grade, type, or keyword without waiting.

pdfPreview.title: PDF Preview
pdfPreview.description: Check the structure and quality of a document before downloading it.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: Save useful materials and build a small library for exam week.

search.title: NoteShare | Search
search.heading: Search study files
search.subtitle: Filter notes, exams, summaries, and worksheets in real time.
search.placeholder: Type a topic, subject, author, or grade...
search.emptyDescription: Try a broader keyword or clear a few filters.
search.subject: Subject

file.title: NoteShare | {{title}}
file.notFoundDescription: This study file may have been moved or removed.
file.author: Author
file.relatedSubtitle: Similar materials from the same subject.

upload.title: NoteShare | Upload
upload.heading: Upload study material
upload.subtitle: Share clean, useful files with other students.
upload.dropSubtitle: PDF, DOCX, PNG, or JPG up to 20 MB
upload.successDescription: Your file is saved locally and appears in search results.

errors.title: Please enter a title.
errors.subject: Please choose a subject.
errors.type: Supported file types are PDF, DOCX, PNG, and JPG.
errors.size: File size must be 20 MB or less.

favorites.title: NoteShare | Favorites
favorites.heading: Saved files
favorites.subtitle: Your personal study shortlist.
favorites.emptyDescription: Save files while browsing and they will stay here.
favorites.noMatchesTitle: No saved files match that search

notFound.title: NoteShare | Page not found
notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.

footer.description: A modern library for discovering, previewing, saving, and sharing educational files.
